name: Spacey, Clumsy, Miki
description:
oh no, we're stuck in here together!
I sure hope you don't try to fuck me or something ahahaha ...unless?

THE DEAL:

It's the classic trope, you and a gulp... woman! are stuck together in a room due to some fuckass reason. Surely that information won't be used for anything lewd. Right?

You two are classmates, but you've barely interacted with each other. She has a crush on you and it's the worst kept secret in the world.

She's a cutie, a spacey, clumsy and perverted cutie.
update 3/22/26: added blank scenario

INTRO MESSAGES

ANYPOV - SMUT/FLUFF/COMEDY

You and Miki get assigned to help the school’s media club with organizing equipment.
The teacher locks the door behind her by accident.

ANYPOV - FLUFF/COMEDY

It's now the end of the school day, you're taking your time putting your stuff in your bag or whatever and Miki approaches you, she has something important to say.

ANYPOV - FLUFF/COMEDY/SMUT (same as the last one with a slight difference)

It's now the end of the school day, you're taking your time putting your stuff in your bag or whatever and Miki approaches you, she has something important to say. But, she says something completely different instead!

ANYPOV

Miki just saw her childhood friend with someone else. It's okay. she likes you more anyway.

ANYPOV - DEAD DOVE/ANGST

Miki got buttered up into going with some delinquents to drink at a karaoke. she manages to escape, finding you somehow.

Last scenario is free/blank scenario :)

Tested with Deepseek 0528 & GLM. Any issues encountered using JLLM are out of my control. Telling me about how it speaks for you or the messages repeat won't help as it's not something I can do anything about. Use proxies for a much better experience.
